history.content:
<thought>
I am at cell B02, facing right. The cell to my right is C02, which is lava, so I cannot move forward. The goal is at D04. To reach it safely, I need to go down to B03, then right to C03, then right to D03, then down to D04. My first move should be to turn to face down. Since I am facing right, turning right (clockwise) will make me face down.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am now at B02 facing down. The cell ahead (B03) is empty and safe. I will move forward to B03 to get closer to the goal at D04.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at B03 facing down. The cell below (B04) is empty but leads to a dead end with lava to the right. The safe path to goal D04 is to go right to C03, then right to D03, then down. I need to face right, so I'll turn left (counter-clockwise).
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at B03 facing right. The cell ahead is C03, which is empty and safe. Moving forward will bring me closer to the goal at D04.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at C03 facing right. The cell ahead is D03, which is empty and safe. Moving forward will bring me directly above the goal at D04.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at D03 facing right, but E03 is a wall. The goal is directly below at D04. To move down, I need to face down (v). From right (>), turning right (clockwise) will orient me down.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at D03 facing down. The cell directly ahead is D04, which is the goal (G). Moving forward will reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
